Open Source Intel Senator Lindsey Graham: “I hope the speculation and rumors about yet another ceasefire extension to reach a deal with Iran are off base. To me, President Trump’s position is clear. I fear the Iranians will play the same old game, dragging things out with minor, symbolic concessions. I believe the bottom line for President Trump is: • No enrichment • American control of the approximately 900 pounds of highly enriched uranium • The opening of the Strait of Hormuz without interference from Iran • Iran must abandon its long range ballistic missile program and any effort to develop a nuclear weapon • Iran must cease support for all terrorist proxies in the region This would allow Iran to exist as a nation, but not as the world’s largest state sponsor of terrorism. If there is no deal, it is time to finish the job.” tweet
